# MuleSoft Slack Connector

> LLM-friendly index for the latest version (2.0) of Slack Connector documentation.
> See [Slack Connector llms-full.txt](https://docs.mulesoft.com/slack-connector/llms-full.txt) for all the Slack Connector documentation in one file.

## Content

- [Slack Connector 2.0](https://docs.mulesoft.com/slack-connector/latest/index.md)
- [Slack Connector 2.0 Reference](https://docs.mulesoft.com/slack-connector/latest/slack-connector-reference.md)
- [Using Anypoint Studio to Configure Slack Connector 2.0](https://docs.mulesoft.com/slack-connector/latest/slack-connector-studio.md)
- [Upgrading and Migrating Slack Connector to Version 2.x](https://docs.mulesoft.com/slack-connector/latest/slack-connector-upgrade-migrate.md)
- [Slack 2.0 XML and Maven Support](https://docs.mulesoft.com/slack-connector/latest/slack-connector-xml-maven.md)
